description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light oak finish, featuring a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. On the right side, there are three vertically stacked drawers, each equipped with a curved metallic handle for easy access. The left side of the desk has two open shelves for storage, supported by a pair of cylindrical metal legs, and a lower open compartment that could be used for placing a computer tower or other items. The central area beneath the tabletop includes a shallow pull-out tray, likely intended for a keyboard. The back and sides of the desk are enclosed with wood panels, providing structural stability and a clean appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, making it suitable for offices, home workspaces, or public urban environments such as libraries or community centers.
description: A modern light oak desk with three drawers, open shelves, and a pull-out keyboard tray, supported by metal legs on one side. The design is functional and clean, ideal for workspaces or public areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with handles on the right, open shelves on the left, and a central pull-out tray.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the desk and the vertical panels enclosing the back and side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the open shelves on the left and the open compartment below, with the metal legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metal legs and the solid wood panel on the back.
